languages.original_text: "You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."

languages.text: "Ты присутствуешь в святилище, не в мясницком зале. Прояви же уважение к нашим святыням".
"You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."
languages.original_text: "Ты присутствуешь в святилище, не в мясницком зале. Прояви же уважение к нашим святыням".

traits.locale_text: "You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."
"You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."
"You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."

languages.text: «Está en un santuario, no en una carnicería. Muestre respeto por nuestros objetos sagrados».
languages.original_text: "You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."

traits.locale_text: «Está en un santuario, no en una carnicería. Muestre respeto por nuestros objetos sagrados».

languages.text: 「ここは聖堂であって、肉屋の作業場ではない。我らの神聖な品々に敬意を払いなさい」
languages.original_text: "You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."

traits.locale_text: 「ここは聖堂であって、肉屋の作業場ではない。我らの神聖な品々に敬意を払いなさい」

languages.text: “这里是圣坛，不是屠宰场。对我们的圣物放尊重些。”
languages.original_text: "You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."

traits.locale_text: “这里是圣坛，不是屠宰场。对我们的圣物放尊重些。”

languages.text: "Das hier ist ein Schrein, kein Schlachthaus. Erweist unseren heiligen Objekten etwas mehr Respekt."
languages.original_text: "You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."

traits.locale_text: "Das hier ist ein Schrein, kein Schlachthaus. Erweist unseren heiligen Objekten etwas mehr Respekt."

languages.text: « Vous vous trouvez dans un sanctuaire, et non dans une boucherie. Faites preuve de respect envers nos objets sacrés. »
languages.original_text: "You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."

traits.locale_text: « Vous vous trouvez dans un sanctuaire, et non dans une boucherie. Faites preuve de respect envers nos objets sacrés. »

languages.text: "Kasap dükkânında değil, tapınaktasın. Kutsalımıza saygı göster."
languages.original_text: "You are in a shrine, not in a butcher's hall. Show respect for our sacred objects."

traits.locale_text: "Kasap dükkânında değil, tapınaktasın. Kutsalımıza saygı göster."
